'''√v-sh-z''' ('''vashaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embezzle|embezzle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embezzle|embezzle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| vashaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazithi|vashazithi]] || [[word:vashaziji|vashaziji]] || [[word:vashazishi|vashazishi]] || [[word:vashazi|vashazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazuthuth|vashazuthuth]] || [[word:vashazujuj|vashazujuj]] || [[word:vashazushush|vashazushush]] || [[word:vashaz|vashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazuthu|vashazuthu]] || [[word:vashazuju|vashazuju]] || [[word:vashazushu|vashazushu]] || [[word:vashazu|vashazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazufuth|vashazufuth]] || [[word:vashazufuj|vashazufuj]] || [[word:vashazufush|vashazufush]] || [[word:vashazuf|vashazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazethe|vashazethe]] || [[word:vashazeje|vashazeje]] || [[word:vashazeshe|vashazeshe]] || [[word:vashaze|vashaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazothoth|vashazothoth]] || [[word:vashazojoj|vashazojoj]] || [[word:vashazoshosh|vashazoshosh]] || [[word:vashaz|vashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazotho|vashazotho]] || [[word:vashazojo|vashazojo]] || [[word:vashazosho|vashazosho]] || [[word:vashazo|vashazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazofoth|vashazofoth]] || [[word:vashazofoj|vashazofoj]] || [[word:vashazofosh|vashazofosh]] || [[word:vashazof|vashazof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazïfïf|vashazïfïf]] || [[word:vashazïfïf|vashazïfïf]] || [[word:vashazïfïf|vashazïfïf]] || [[word:vashazïfïf|vashazïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]] || [[word:vashazïf|vashazïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vashazæthæ|vashazæthæ]] || [[word:vashazæjæ|vashazæjæ]] || [[word:vashazæshæ|vashazæshæ]] || [[word:vashazæ|vashazæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashazathath|vashazathath]] || [[word:vashazajaj|vashazajaj]] || [[word:vashazashash|vashazashash]] || [[word:vashaz|vashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashazatha|vashazatha]] || [[word:vashazaja|vashazaja]] || [[word:vashazasha|vashazasha]] || [[word:vashaza|vashaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashazafath|vashazafath]] || [[word:vashazafaj|vashazafaj]] || [[word:vashazafash|vashazafash]] || [[word:vashazaf|vashazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vashazasha|vashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govashazasha|govashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivashazasha|gokivashazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vashaznüsha|vashaznüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govashaznknüsha|govashaznknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivashaznüsha|gokivashaznüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vashazshësha|vashazshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govashaznkshësha|govashaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivashazshësha|gokivashazshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazrosha|vashazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashaznkrosha|govashaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazrosha|gokivashazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazmusha|vashazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govashaznkmusha|govashaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazmusha|gokivashazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vashazsherasha|vashazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govashaznksherasha|govashaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivashazsherasha|gokivashazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vashazngasha|vashazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govashaznkngasha|govashaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivashazngasha|gokivashazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vashazyasha|vashazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govashaznkyasha|govashaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivashazyasha|gokivashazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vashazyamasha|vashazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govashaznkyamasha|govashaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivashazyamasha|gokivashazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashaznüshësha|vashaznüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashaznknüshësha|govashaznknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashaznüshësha|gokivashaznüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashaznürosha|vashaznürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashaznknürosha|govashaznknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashaznürosha|gokivashaznürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashaznümusha|vashaznümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashaznknümusha|govashaznknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashaznümusha|gokivashaznümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazshënüsha|vashazshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashaznkshënüsha|govashaznkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazshënüsha|gokivashazshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazshërosha|vashazshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashaznkshërosha|govashaznkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazshërosha|gokivashazshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazshëmusha|vashazshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashaznkshëmusha|govashaznkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazshëmusha|gokivashazshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazronüsha|vashazronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashaznkronüsha|govashaznkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazronüsha|gokivashazronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashazroshësha|vashazroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashaznkroshësha|govashaznkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashazroshësha|gokivashazroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vashazromusha|vashazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govashaznkromusha|govashaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivashazromusha|gokivashazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vashazmunüsha|vashazmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govashaznkmunüsha|govashaznkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivashazmunüsha|gokivashazmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vashazmushësha|vashazmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govashaznkmushësha|govashaznkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivashazmushësha|gokivashazmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vashazmurosha|vashazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govashaznkmurosha|govashaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivashazmurosha|gokivashazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vashaz|vashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:væshæz|væshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovashaz|hovashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovæshæz|hovæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovashaz|hohovashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovæshæz|hohovæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüvashaz|nüvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüvæshæz|nüvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüvashaz|nünüvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüvæshæz|nünüvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïvashaz|nïvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïvæshæz|nïvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïvashaz|nïnïvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïvæshæz|nïnïvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvashaz|luvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvæshæz|luvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvashaz|luluvashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvæshæz|luluvæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livashaz|livashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livæshæz|livæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivashaz|lilivashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivæshæz|lilivæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovashaz|kovashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovæshæz|kovæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovashaz|kokovashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovæshæz|kokovæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevashaz|kevashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevæshæz|kevæshæz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevashaz|kekevashaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevæshæz|kekevæshæz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
